items.name: Animal
items.description: A creature that shares fields with Robot for the Creature union.

fields.name: is_domestic
fields.description: Optional. True, if the animal is domesticated, defaults to True.

items.name: Robot
items.description: A creature that shares fields with Animal for the Creature union.

items.name: Creature
items.description: Either an Animal or a Robot.

items.name: getAnimal
items.description: Use this method to get information about an animal.
items.returns: On success, the requested Animal object is returned.

items.name: listAnimals
items.description: Use this method to list every known animal.
items.returns: Returns an Array of Animal objects.

items.name: removeAnimal
items.description: Use this method to remove an animal.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier of the animal to remove.

items.name: getCreature
items.description: Use this method to get a creature of unspecified kind.

items.name: mysteryMethod
items.description: Deliberately vague method exercising the unresolved-return-type fallback.
items.returns: Something that isn't described in a way this generator recognizes at all.

items.name: sendGreeting
items.description: Use this method to send a greeting to a chat.

params.name: chat_id
params.description: Unique identifier for the target chat.

items.returns: On success, the created Person is returned.
